properties.name: server.port
properties.description: 服务器端口号，默认 8181

properties.name: spring.servlet.multipart.max-file-size
properties.description: 单个文件最大上传大小，默认 4096MB

properties.name: spring.servlet.multipart.max-request-size
properties.description: 单次请求最大上传大小，默认 4096MB

properties.name: server.tomcat.basedir
properties.description: Tomcat 工作目录，用于存储缓存和临时文件

properties.name: server.tomcat.connection-timeout
properties.description: Tomcat 连接超时时间（毫秒），默认 1800000（30分钟）

properties.name: spring.devtools.restart.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 Spring DevTools 热重载功能

properties.name: spring.devtools.restart.additional-paths
properties.description: DevTools 额外监控的目录路径

properties.name: spring.devtools.restart.exclude
properties.description: DevTools 排除监控的目录或文件

properties.name: spring.thymeleaf.cache
properties.description: 是否启用 Thymeleaf 模板缓存，dev 环境建议关闭

properties.name: spring.web.resources.cache.period
properties.description: 静态资源缓存周期（秒），dev 环境建议设为 0 禁用缓存

properties.name: tfs.copies
properties.description: 文件副本数量，用于数据冗余存储

properties.name: tfs.web-entrypoint
properties.description: TFS Web 服务入口地址

properties.name: tfs.root-path
properties.description: TFS 根目录路径，存储所有文件数据

properties.name: tfs.path-prefix
properties.description: TFS 文件路径前缀

properties.name: tfs.config
properties.description: TFS 配置文件路径

properties.name: tfs.ffmpeg-url
properties.description: FFmpeg 可执行文件路径，用于音视频转码

properties.name: tfs.thumbnail-width
properties.description: 缩略图宽度（像素），默认 480

properties.name: tfs.thumbnail-quality
properties.description: 缩略图质量（1-100），默认 80

properties.name: etcd.endpoints
properties.description: Etcd 集群端点地址，用于配置管理和服务发现

properties.name: meili-search.url
properties.description: Meilisearch 服务地址

properties.name: meili-search.master-key
properties.description: Meilisearch 主密钥，用于 API 认证

properties.name: meili-search.web-ui
properties.description: Meilisearch Web UI 访问地址

properties.name: sso.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 SSO 单点登录

properties.name: sso.server-url
properties.description: SSO 服务器地址

properties.name: sso.info-url
properties.description: SSO 用户信息查询接口地址

properties.name: sso.cookie-name
properties.description: SSO 会话 Cookie 名称

properties.name: s3.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 S3 兼容对象存储

properties.name: s3.access-key
properties.description: S3 访问密钥（Access Key ID）

properties.name: s3.secret-key
properties.description: S3 密钥（Secret Access Key）

properties.name: s3.region
properties.description: S3 存储区域，默认 us-east-1

properties.name: s3.bucket
properties.description: S3 存储桶名称
